common.offlineBanner: You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.

instructions.rules: \\\\n## LANGUAGE RULES (ENGLISH)\\\\n- Prioritize communicating with the user in **English**.\\\\n- Follow proper English grammar and punctuation.\\\\n- Be concise and clear in your responses.\\\\n- Match the user's tone and formality level.\\\\n- If the user uses casual language or profanity, you may respond similarly if appropriate.\\\\n
instructions.reminder: LANGUAGE: Match the user's current language (default: English).
instructions.reinforcement: Respond in the user's language. If they use English, follow English conventions and phrasing.
